ba5e11ae-0002-4000-8000-000000000002.Text: The full inheritance of a Space Marine: superhuman physiology, mastery of bolt, plasma, melta and flame weapons, power armour training, and the transhuman resilience of the Adeptus Astartes.

e4ca8c3d-0002-4000-8000-000000000002.Text: An Astartes is proof against the terrors of the warp and the disabling tricks of lesser foes: immune to Warp-born fear, never knocked prone, and resistant to control effects.

d3271785-3e5c-4593-a6a0-3f186e945fa8.Text: Your body is the work of the Emperor's design and your Chapter's long discipline. Ossmodula hardened bone, implanted organs, black carapace, and decades of hypno-indoctrination have made you more than human. You are newly sworn to this Watch Station, but you do not enter its service as a mortal soldier.

1189a61c-754b-45df-9e0e-ab491e56688c.Text: The Ultramarines carry the weight of Roboute Guilliman's example into every theatre of war. They prize order, adaptability, and command under pressure. In the Deathwatch, such a Battle-Brother often becomes the fixed point around which less predictable allies can rally.

bf01f9fd-d320-43fd-9884-19bc056562cb.Text: Your kill tally includes a strain, brood, or warband whose name is marked for destruction in the Watch Station's archives. You know the alien by scent, spoor, and failure pattern.

8852fbd6-4a73-4b2d-9eb6-90b010c2f023.Text: Some part of your record is sealed by command of the Watch. You obey without protest, but silence has made a fortress of your manner.

ed9853f7-5c28-4f52-988e-d4bbc2ebd3da.Text: The sons of Sanguinius are warriors of terrible grace, noble in bearing and swift to wrath when blood is spilled. In the Deathwatch, a Blood Angel brings beauty, discipline, and a hunger for close battle that must be mastered as much as unleashed.

13025d74-f91e-44e0-8bb0-c6913f501f10.Text: The Dark Angels keep their own counsel even among sworn brothers. They are relentless hunters, grim custodians of ancient shame, and masters of patient war. In the Deathwatch, their silence is often mistaken for distrust, until the quarry is found and the sentence is carried out.

5f7b0cb0-efdd-451e-8b75-fdf8a3f1f5f9.Text: The Black Templars wage the Emperor's wars as an endless crusade. Their faith is iron, their hatred of the witch absolute, and their answer to doubt is the blade. In the Deathwatch, they are fearsome assault warriors whose fervour must be aimed with care.

cd33523e-bd25-4a60-82d2-f087372b1cb5.Text: The White Scars strike as a storm front, swift, laughing, and gone before the foe can answer. Their sons favour movement, sudden violence, and the freedom of the open kill zone. In the Deathwatch, a White Scar is often first to find the enemy's weak flank.

d7555140-195e-49ad-9a1b-29864c39958a.Text: The Iron Hands regard frailty as a debt to be paid in iron. Their warriors are cold, exacting, and pitiless toward weakness in themselves most of all. In the Deathwatch, their discipline and machine lore are invaluable, though seldom comforting.

2eacc5a9-446c-437f-8c03-eeafdbdabdc4.Text: The Space Wolves are hunters, oath-keepers, and warriors of fierce instinct. They bring a pack's loyalty and a predator's sense for weakness. In the Deathwatch, their wild manner hides a proven eye for battlefield truth.

00a11ea6-b41e-4381-b58f-ccff453b88a8.Text: The Imperial Fists are the wall that does not break. They endure, fortify, and answer impossible odds with colder resolve. In the Deathwatch, an Imperial Fist is trusted to hold the line when the line has ceased to exist.

89e3279b-6c6c-4f96-8e45-9243f676dd7a.Text: The Raven Guard wage war through patience, silence, and sudden execution. They know that a single cut in the right place can spare a thousand lesser blows. In the Deathwatch, they are scouts, assassins, and hunters of command nodes.

b5551238-d256-4db3-a54c-3e498ec1cdf9.Text: The Salamanders are artisans of war and guardians of those the Imperium would otherwise spend without thought. They endure flame, pain, and loss with solemn dignity. In the Deathwatch, their wrath burns hottest when the helpless stand behind them.

5bbea062-8ba3-41fb-9c96-489e090b15c2.Text: You are the blade at the moment of impact. Whether descending on jump pack fire or crossing a breach under withering fire, your duty is to close with the enemy and break them where they stand.

22d64e29-b961-4b67-8f8b-4ae0b1af9324.Text: You preserve the gene-seed of the Chapter and the lives of those who bear it. Your hands know both mercy and execution, for a fallen Battle-Brother is never merely a casualty.

ca3c6843-8ef5-4229-9af1-f11b6c555229.Text: You are the kill-team's wrath made sustained and methodical. Where others advance, you anchor the field, measure the range, and reduce the foe by fire and shell.

986bd49b-64d6-4fd0-88c4-0c945cbae674.Text: You are trained to answer any theatre of war. Bolter, blade, breach, command, and counterattack all fall within your charge. In the kill-team, you are the Battle-Brother who makes separate strengths act as one.

2a5af241-87f4-4a15-be40-2dbd770ce8ba.Text: You have been entrusted to the mysteries of the Machine Cult without ceasing to be a son of your Chapter. Armour, weapon, gate, and engine answer to your rites when lesser hands would only profane them.

584ccc88-70ac-4ec2-a9e0-af12dcf1da8c.Text: You bear the perilous gift of the psyker under the strictures of Chapter, Librarius, and Watch. Your mind is a weapon and a gate, and every use of it is an oath renewed against damnation.

8dbf1dce-9a75-4b91-8288-fe69db49061a.Text: You stood where retreat would have doomed the line. Bodies broke against your armour until the passage was choked with the dead and the living could advance behind you.

ba03394b-76f4-4d24-a126-c4f28a799334.Text: You identified the command beast, witch-node, or officer strain and cut it from the host. The enemy lived, but its will died first.

ac6af487-1c4d-4e5a-a62d-b6000a1ebd96.Text: You returned a weapon, helm, standard, or gene-vault fragment from ground declared lost. The object was not merely saved. It was judged worthy of blood.

33c0bab1-ae81-461f-8692-8f0fbb889e38.Text: A psyker, sorcerer, or warp-touched abomination met your denial and failed to pass it. You have seen the veil strain and did not look away.

19afe91b-42ba-42d6-b7f5-5eb706962adc.Text: You were part of a strike that ended a war by ending its master. The memory is clean: entry, target, confirmation, extraction.

2296045d-2409-411f-869a-86f2a048ba69.Text: Your squad was broken around you, yet the mission order was fulfilled. The Watch does not honour survival. It honours what survival was spent to achieve.

70cdd68c-8c67-4f1b-a3fd-4b09b798f660.Text: You swore an objective would be taken before dawn, and dawn found you wounded among the embers with the oath complete. Such records are brief. They do not need ornament.

abe232e5-1b94-4f05-bdfa-f99150ad9feb.Text: The Last Name on the Roll

5060a5db-7618-4abf-bbcf-a5aee742fcd7.Text: You returned alone from a deployment whose names are still spoken in the Reclusiam. You do not waste the lives of brothers, because you have heard what follows waste.

16ea80e6-7bb7-45f9-ae9d-4acb4fdedc1e.Text: You failed to recover what should never have been lost, or paid too much to recover it. Since that day, every fallen brother is a charge placed in your hands.

97d494ed-e377-4c7e-8a0c-b16ab513ad72.Text: Your deed was necessary, but not clean. The Watch did not cast you out. It marked the record and placed you where necessity is common.

364efb41-2a61-4df7-aae6-7d8c5ff8150b.Text: The immaterium touched the mission and left a sign upon your memory. You know the taste of false voices and the cost of hesitation.

aa3569c0-f6bf-431a-ade1-61a332894ab0.Text: Something in battle answers too quickly when blood is near. Discipline holds it in check, but discipline is not the same as peace.

73d0d015-2342-4b17-8acf-d4d032e63bd4.Text: Armour, weapon, or sacred engine failed under your charge, and the price was paid in lives. You have learned to listen when the machine spirit gives warning.

acd792b3-38ad-4100-86ff-e4c57ee34ab2.Text: Orders failed, vox died, and command passed to you in the space between one heartbeat and the next. Victory followed, but so did scrutiny.

0bcf575a-f67c-4641-a723-aa7b9b1141cf.Text: Armour of a son of Guilliman, repainted in the black of the Long Vigil. Its bearer fights by the Codex Astartes, lending the Deathwatch the measured precision of the XIII.

d60d05ab-958e-4ff3-95df-b9d2bd5f25a5.Text: Deathwatch Black Templar Mark VII "Aquila Armour"

65cd65a4-64e6-47da-8756-c8500148493e.Text: Armour of a Sword Brother, crusade-oaths chained across its black ceramite. Its wearer carries the unquenchable zeal of the Eternal Crusade into the hunt.

a8163d91-e25e-4382-a9cb-60196055330a.Text: Deathwatch Dark Angel Mark VII "Aquila Armour"

23e1907d-6355-4078-8d3a-ef2727c201db.Text: Armour of the First Legion, worn by one of the Unforgiven. Its bearer keeps his own counsel and his Chapter's secrets, watchful even among kill-team brothers.

9246cdbe-9e76-439b-96c3-4f553a0eb2e1.Text: Deathwatch Imperial Fist Mark VII "Aquila Armour"

e9fc4a79-904f-4e31-b651-b52ea8bad690.Text: Siege-scarred armour of a son of Dorn, proof against punishment few could endure. Its wearer holds the line where others would break.

4a1a9c0b-fa3f-46e2-aed1-a977d3e0c5d1.Text: Deathwatch Iron Hand Mark VII "Aquila Armour"

6f1be1fe-2630-40d7-97e9-de074c03324d.Text: Augmetic-laced armour of a son of Manus, flesh given over to the certainty of iron. Its bearer counts weakness a thing to be cut away.

3d5c7e42-6ddf-419d-bb52-cff57ee8dda5.Text: Deathwatch Raven Guard Mark VII "Aquila Armour"

2f9f8500-8896-4b12-bd62-a11fcdbc4b2a.Text: Lightened armour of a son of Corax, built for the strike from shadow. Its wearer is gone before the enemy knows he was there.

8e4a756b-9d49-47af-9429-bece85d10db2.Text: Fire-blackened armour of a son of Vulkan, forged by a hand that never abandons the innocent. Its bearer answers the xenos with flame.

a68ee514-c0be-4133-8a3b-a031e9e87b6d.Text: Deathwatch Space Wolf Mark VII "Aquila Armour"

15c27f0d-346c-42a4-b2c8-a31532bfb521.Text: Trophy-hung armour of a son of Russ, heavy with the reek of Fenris. Its wearer hunts with a wildness the Codex could never tame.

71864722-62b1-4d8d-9f81-aa9348cc9b27.Text: Deathwatch White Scar Mark VII "Aquila Armour"

ddc770cd-ac20-4f8a-b821-8d166f5cf018.Text: Swift armour of a son of the Khan, made for the lightning strike. Its bearer runs down prey that thinks itself already escaped.

e16a4b73-a567-4c50-a920-439736de17c0.Text: Deathwatch Blood Angel Mark VII "Aquila Armour"

093a661a-a97b-431a-a69e-fbd7c3d5ff34.Text: Noble armour of a son of Sanguinius, beautiful and terrible alike. Its bearer masters the Red Thirst, turning the curse of his blood into a weapon.

2d6a152c-5b69-4320-88c1-4b9333fba2aa.Text: The {g|Encyclopedia:RateOfFire}rate of fire{/g} of your bolt, melta, plasma, and flame weapons is increased by +20%.

dea7c0de-0005-4000-8000-000000000005.Text: The black cape of the Long Vigil, marking its bearer as a sworn brother of the Deathwatch.

dea7c0de-0006-4000-8000-000000000006.Text:
The wearer receives −5 less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} from critical {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hits{/g}.
The wearer gains +10 {g|Encyclopedia:SkillCoercion}Coercion{/g}.

dea7c0de-0007-4000-8000-000000000007.Text: While wearing {g|Encyclopedia:HeavyArmour}heavy armour{/g} or power armour, this character gains +1 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}, +1 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}, and cannot fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}.

dea7c0de-0008-4000-8000-000000000008.Text: Once per combat, when this character suffers the {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlindedEffect}blinded{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ImmobilisedEffect}immobilised{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:StaggeredEffect}staggered{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} effect, this effect is ignored, and they instead gain +20% of their {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g} as temporary wounds.

dea7c0de-0009-4000-8000-000000000009.Text: The sealed battle-helm of the Long Vigil. Its auto-senses guard the wearer's senses, and its cogitator attunes itself to the wearer's speciality, awakening additional systems.

dea7c0de-0013-4000-8000-000000000013.Text: The tactical cogitator grants +{uip|Skill|4269752521e44a25a751121ff250fd4d} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}.

dea7c0de-0015-4000-8000-000000000015.Text: The diagnostor grants +{uip|Medicae|3d2b14cfaafd45e9b481b959f90cf247} {g|Encyclopedia:SkillMedicae}Medicae{/g} and +{uip|Crit|3d2b14cfaafd45e9b481b959f90cf247}% critical damage.

dea7c0de-0017-4000-8000-000000000017.Text: {g|Encyclopedia:SkillDemolition}Demolition{/g} is calculated using {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}. The wearer's attacks gain +{uip|Auspex|c301ee3feedb476096a9faad89aef58b}% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Overpenetration}overpenetration{/g}.

dea7c0de-0019-4000-8000-000000000019.Text: Pistol attacks gain +{uip|Pistol|ae4551c73a3948a69e69314a8d5177e2} {g|Encyclopedia:HitChance}hit chance{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g}. Melee attacks gain +{uip|Melee|ae4551c73a3948a69e69314a8d5177e2}% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g} and critical damage.

dea7c0de-0021-4000-8000-000000000021.Text: The gene-wrights of the Imperium built the Astartes beyond mortal limits. Failed {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g} tests are rerolled once, and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g} can always be increased when levelling up.

dea7c0de-0023-4000-8000-000000000023.Text: Nineteen transhuman organs armour the Astartes from within. Failed {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} tests are rerolled once, and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} can always be increased when levelling up.

dea7c0de-0024-4000-8000-000000000024.Text:
At the start of combat, the Battle-Brother gains +{unit_stat|WarhammerAgility|bonus} stacks of the sure-fire plan effect. Activation of this {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} consumes 1 stack and makes the next action stronger depending on the type of action:
-<indent=5%>If the Battle-Brother attacks, they deal +{uip|AdditionalDamage|d86d492df4884f13a6cc10f0092d1ac0}% more {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>If the Battle-Brother moves, they gain +{uip|AdditionalDodge|d86d492df4884f13a6cc10f0092d1ac0}% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g} until the start of their next turn.</indent>
-<indent=5%>If the Battle-Brother uses a non-damaging ability on an enemy, that enemy suffers a −{uip|AdditionalDamageTarget|d86d492df4884f13a6cc10f0092d1ac0}% penalty to damage for one round.</indent>
Can be used multiple times per turn.

dea7c0de-0025-4000-8000-000000000025.Text:
The helm grants +{uip|Armour|e74e3edc09334be28291774d5e6fd7b7} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} and +{uip|Awareness|e74e3edc09334be28291774d5e6fd7b7} {g|Encyclopedia:SkillAwareness}Awareness{/g}.
The tactical cogitator grants +{uip|Skill|4269752521e44a25a751121ff250fd4d} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}.

dea7c0de-0026-4000-8000-000000000026.Text:
The helm grants +{uip|Armour|e74e3edc09334be28291774d5e6fd7b7} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} and +{uip|Awareness|e74e3edc09334be28291774d5e6fd7b7} {g|Encyclopedia:SkillAwareness}Awareness{/g}.
The diagnostor grants +{uip|Medicae|3d2b14cfaafd45e9b481b959f90cf247} {g|Encyclopedia:SkillMedicae}Medicae{/g} and +{uip|Crit|3d2b14cfaafd45e9b481b959f90cf247}% critical damage.

dea7c0de-0027-4000-8000-000000000027.Text:
The helm grants +{uip|Armour|e74e3edc09334be28291774d5e6fd7b7} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} and +{uip|Awareness|e74e3edc09334be28291774d5e6fd7b7} {g|Encyclopedia:SkillAwareness}Awareness{/g}.
{g|Encyclopedia:SkillDemolition}Demolition{/g} is calculated using {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}. The wearer's attacks gain +{uip|Auspex|c301ee3feedb476096a9faad89aef58b}% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:Overpenetration}overpenetration{/g}.

dea7c0de-0028-4000-8000-000000000028.Text:
The helm grants +{uip|Armour|e74e3edc09334be28291774d5e6fd7b7} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} and +{uip|Awareness|e74e3edc09334be28291774d5e6fd7b7} {g|Encyclopedia:SkillAwareness}Awareness{/g}.
Pistol attacks gain +{uip|Pistol|ae4551c73a3948a69e69314a8d5177e2} {g|Encyclopedia:HitChance}hit chance{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g}. Melee attacks gain +{uip|Melee|ae4551c73a3948a69e69314a8d5177e2}% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g} and critical damage.

dea7c0de-0037-4000-8000-000000000037.Text:
The helm grants +{uip|Armour|e74e3edc09334be28291774d5e6fd7b7} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} and +{uip|Awareness|e74e3edc09334be28291774d5e6fd7b7} {g|Encyclopedia:SkillAwareness}Awareness{/g}.
The psychic hood grants +{uip|LoreWarp|e7ea329f4d4e4f89b4fedb9f75e09033} {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLoreWarp}Lore (Warp){/g} and +{uip|Resolve|e7ea329f4d4e4f89b4fedb9f75e09033} {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g}.

dea7c0de-0038-4000-8000-000000000038.Text:
The helm grants +{uip|Armour|e74e3edc09334be28291774d5e6fd7b7} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} and +{uip|Awareness|e74e3edc09334be28291774d5e6fd7b7} {g|Encyclopedia:SkillAwareness}Awareness{/g}.
The machine-spirit grants +{uip|TechUse|a0df37ca836e4184b8dbcdd10dc5fd62} {g|Encyclopedia:SkillTechUse}Tech-Use{/g} and +{uip|Armour|a0df37ca836e4184b8dbcdd10dc5fd62} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}.

dea7c0de-0047-4000-8000-000000000047.Text: Pistol hit chance and dodge reduction

dea7c0de-0048-4000-8000-000000000048.Text: Melee dodge reduction and critical damage

dea7c0de-0064-4000-8000-000000000064.Text: The Battle-Brother gains +{uip|DamageBlocked|a9343f4385eb49ee9d3338aa74a75d9f}% block when targeted with ranged attacks.

dea7c0de-0065-4000-8000-000000000065.Text:
Every time the Battle-Brother uses plasma or melta weapons, his {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} with these weapons increases by +{uip|DamageBonus|2d333d024504422e99f524cb5fcf9db3}%. Stacks.
If the Battle-Brother does not shoot for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, he loses all stacks.

dea7c0de-0066-4000-8000-000000000066.Text:
Space Marines gain +{uip|Resolve|884ddece28ca4520b5b0d2a737fabfb5} {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} if there are 3 or more creatures (allies or enemies) in a 3-cell radius.
Yet they suffer a −2 {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g} to resolve with no creatures around.

dea7c0de-0067-4000-8000-000000000067.Text: Space Marines can pass {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance tests{/g} using their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} value instead, if the character's Fellowship is higher.

dea7c0de-0068-4000-8000-000000000068.Text: If a Space Marine has {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeSuperiority}melee superiority{/g} against the enemy, the effect is increased by +10. If an enemy has {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee{/g} superiority against a Space Marine, the effect is decreased by −10.

dea7c0de-0069-4000-8000-000000000069.Text:
If a Space Marine starts their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} adjacent to an ally character, that Space Marine gains +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}.
If a Space Marine ends their turn adjacent to allies, they all gain +2 MP on their next turn.

dea7c0de-0070-4000-8000-000000000070.Text: Space Marines gain a +50% {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} against the first {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attack of opportunity{/g} every {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.

dea7c0de-0071-4000-8000-000000000071.Text:
Once per combat, when the {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} of a Space Marine drop below 30%, they gain +20% of their {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g} as {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g}.
Space Marines also gain a +20% bonus to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} and armour while they have at least 1 temporary wound from any source.

dea7c0de-0072-4000-8000-000000000072.Text: Space Marines gain +15% {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g} against targets with the {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} effect or with 50% or less of their {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}.

dea7c0de-0073-4000-8000-000000000073.Text: Space Marines gain +10% to {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g} for axes, hammers, and las weapons.

dea7c0de-0074-4000-8000-000000000074.Text:
Every {g|Encyclopedia:Injury}injury{/g} increases the Space Marine's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} by +5 (up to a maximum of +60).
Every {g|Encyclopedia:Traumas}trauma{/g} counts as 3 injuries.

dea7c0de-0075-4000-8000-000000000075.Text: Space Marines suffer −{unit_stat|WarhammerToughness|bonus} less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} from fire, {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}toxic damage{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} effects.

dea7c0de-0076-4000-8000-000000000076.Text:
The Space Marine gains +15 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} and +15 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}.
This effect lasts until the Space Marine moves. Does not stack.

dea7c0de-0077-4000-8000-000000000077.Text: {g|f:7e75728ba44541b5985588702d0e08bb}Perfect Spot{/g} additionally grants the Space Marine +{uip|ArmourPenetration|07276669fcc04e2a9e7a5a3055c58b8c}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} against enemies that are 7 cells away or farther.

dea7c0de-0078-4000-8000-000000000078.Text: If the Space Marine has not moved this {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they deal +{uip|DamageBonus|233f7d66b32243a192b6960e0058da54} more damage with {g|Encyclopedia:SingleRangedAttacksGlossary}single-shot{/g} attacks for every 5 cells between them and the target and gain +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill} Ballistic Skill{/g}. These bonuses do not stack and last until the Space Marine moves.

dea7c0de-0079-4000-8000-000000000079.Text:
Each time a Space Marine kills an enemy, they gain +10 stacks of never stop shooting. At the start of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, there is a <u>(stacks of never stop shooting)</u>% chance that the first attack this {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g} will cost 0 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and will not count toward the attack limit per turn.
If this effect triggers, all the stacks are lost.

dea7c0de-0080-4000-8000-000000000080.Text: Space Marines gain +7 to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} while in combat. Yet while out of combat, their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g}, Perception, and Willpower are decreased by −7.

dea7c0de-0081-4000-8000-000000000081.Text: Each round Space Marines gain a stacking +1% {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} to {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} against {g|Encyclopedia:RangeAreaAttacksGlossary}ranged attacks{/g} for each shot they made during this round. Also, the ranged {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}burst{/g} attack grants an additional +10 stacks of never stop shooting.

dea7c0de-0082-4000-8000-000000000082.Text: At the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, Space Marines gain stacks of never stop shooting equal to <u>(half the minimal {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} of the most damaging {g|Encyclopedia:RangeAreaAttacksGlossary}ranged weapon{/g} they used this {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g})</u>.

dea7c0de-0083-4000-8000-000000000083.Text: Space Marines' first {g|Encyclopedia:Reload}reload{/g} in combat costs 0 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}. Reloading a weapon grants an additional +10 stacks of never stop shooting.

dea7c0de-0084-4000-8000-000000000084.Text:
When all stacks of never stop shooting should be lost, they become {uip|Stacks|c75384d4cdae4d1aa1c3d94e7c100ae2} stacks instead.
Additionally, a Space Marine may upgrade their {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristic{/g} even if their current archetypes do not allow it.

dea7c0de-0085-4000-8000-000000000085.Text:
A Space Marine can re-roll any failed attack, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristic{/g}, or skill {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g} with a 20% chance of success. This chance cannot be greater than the base success chance of the roll.
Additionally, any enemy dodge or parry against a Space Marine has a 20% chance to fail after a successful roll.

dea7c0de-0086-4000-8000-000000000086.Text: Any time a Space Marine scores a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g}, there is a 10% chance to double the {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.

dea7c0de-0087-4000-8000-000000000087.Text: The Space Marine has a 20% chance to survive after suffering lethal {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}, surviving with 1 {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wound{/g}.

dea7c0de-0088-4000-8000-000000000088.Text:
While a Space Marine has more than 50% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, all chances of all creatures (including enemies) in a 3-cell radius are increased by +10%.
While a Space Marine has less than 50% wounds, all chances of all creatures (including enemies) in a 3-cell radius are decreased by −10%.

dea7c0de-0089-4000-8000-000000000089.Text:
Any time an {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:Talent}talent{/g} uses the {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} bonus, a Space Marine can instead use the {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} bonus, if it is higher.
Additionally, Space Marines can always upgrade Intelligence even if their {g|Encyclopedia:Career}archetype{/g} does not allow it.

dea7c0de-0090-4000-8000-000000000090.Text:
When used, for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g} the Space Marine and their allies do not suffer damage from allied attacks and deal +{uip|DamageBonus|6383ebaf92e443eaaeb3fe937032f33f}% more damage to enemies that were attacked by them since ability activation. If multiple Space Marines are in combat, the effect does not stack.
! Can only be used once per combat.

dea7c0de-0091-4000-8000-000000000091.Text: While the effect of {g|f:a15dd47c2d294b8b881604dd233b8e0f}Regimental Tactics{/g} lasts, the Space Marine's and their allies' weapon attacks gain +20% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:ParryReduction}parry reduction{/g}, block reduction, and {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} penetration against enemies that have already been attacked by the Space Marine's allies this combat.

dea7c0de-0092-4000-8000-000000000092.Text: While the Space Marine is under the {g|f:a15dd47c2d294b8b881604dd233b8e0f}Regimental Tactics{/g} effect, all their allies gain +5% to {g|Encyclopedia:RateOfFire}rate of fire{/g} for every attack they have made since the start of this effect.

dea7c0de-0093-4000-8000-000000000093.Text: Whenever the Space Marine or their ally performs a {g|Encyclopedia:HeroicAct}heroic act{/g}, all the Space Marine's {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are increased by +7 until the end of combat.

dea7c0de-0094-4000-8000-000000000094.Text: The Space Marine grants the {g|f:b9f9ef145708451f81283a73c16c527d}braced{/g} effect to each ally (including themselves) in a 5-cell radius. The effect lasts for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. The Space Marine gains +1 charge of this ability at the start of combat, when their {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} drop below 50% for the first time in combat, and each time an ally falls unconscious for the first time in combat.

dea7c0de-0095-4000-8000-000000000095.Text: While the {g|f:b9f9ef145708451f81283a73c16c527d}braced{/g} effect lasts, the Space Marine can use the {g|f:282940ecb99948a28adc9cb60374223b}Get off me!{/g} ability once per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, and the targets of their {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attacks{/g} must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −10 penalty or fall {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}.

dea7c0de-0096-4000-8000-000000000096.Text: Whenever the Space Marine uses the {g|f:f0d6fd0433624181a3a6c9bb6fd60ab5}Brace for Impact!{/g} ability, all enemies in a 5-cell radius around them suffer −{uip|Debuff|df8bff986a62440fa9f01e04c3bf5703} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} and −{uip|Debuff|df8bff986a62440fa9f01e04c3bf5703} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}.

dea7c0de-0097-4000-8000-000000000097.Text:
Allies with the {g|f:b9f9ef145708451f81283a73c16c527d}braced{/g} effect or affected by the Space Marine's other non-attacking archetype abilities gain +{uip|dodge bonus|b79a772332e64e99921463bb28030674}% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Does not stack.
The Space Marine and their allies with the {g|f:b9f9ef145708451f81283a73c16c527d}braced{/g} effect do not provoke {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g}.

dea7c0de-0098-4000-8000-000000000098.Text:
Space Marines choose one augmentation system from the following list:
-<indent=5%>Subskin {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Armour{/g}: grants +<u>(5 + 2 × TGH bonus)</u>% armour.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Locomotion System: grants +<u>(AGI bonus / 2)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} and +<u>(2 × AGI bonus)</u>% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Analytics System: grants +<u>(10 + INT bonus)</u>% {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g}.</indent>

dea7c0de-0099-4000-8000-000000000099.Text: Space Marines gain +{unit_stat|WarhammerToughness|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g} against the {g|Encyclopedia:BurningEffect}burning{/g} effect and flame weapons.

dea7c0de-0100-4000-8000-000000000100.Text:
Space Marines gain a stacking +10% {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} to hit chance and {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g} against any target they hit with a single-target attack.
Successful {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hits{/g} from single-target attacks increase the hit chance and dodge reduction by +20%.

dea7c0de-0101-4000-8000-000000000101.Text: Space Marines can use {g|Encyclopedia:SkillPersuasion}Persuasion{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:SkillCoercion}Coercion{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:SkillCommerce}Commerce{/g} based on {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} instead of {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g}.

dea7c0de-0102-4000-8000-000000000102.Text: Space Marine may use {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g} after attacking or using {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}abilities{/g}.

dea7c0de-0103-4000-8000-000000000103.Text: Space Marines can select any {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristic{/g} (except for {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} or {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}) and add a +10 {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g}.

dea7c0de-0104-4000-8000-000000000104.Text: When a Space Marine is affected by an ally's non-damaging {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} or affects an ally with such an ability, their {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g} is increased by {uip|Resolve|1a9f01d856144172863ef2ffecab6d4e} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.

dea7c0de-0105-4000-8000-000000000105.Text: While under 40% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, Space Marines gain a +10 {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} to all {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} and +2 to {g|Encyclopedia:Resolve}resolve{/g}.

dea7c0de-0106-4000-8000-000000000106.Text:
Space Marines gain +10% {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g} and +10% {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} against xenos or daemonic creatures. Their allies gain half the {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonuses{/g} of Know No Heresy.
However, Space Marines' {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLoreXenos}Lore (Xenos){/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLoreWarp}Lore (Warp){/g} are always 0.

dea7c0de-0107-4000-8000-000000000107.Text: While the psyker is not in the target's {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}, all {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance tests{/g} of the target suffer a −{uip|ResistancePenalty|2cab29e13d404ab986a2f825d0dc8914} {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g}.

dea7c0de-0108-4000-8000-000000000108.Text: At the start of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, if the Space Marine has no stacks of sure-fire plan, they gain +1 stack.

dea7c0de-0109-4000-8000-000000000109.Text: Once per combat, if the Space Marine has at least 1 stack of sure-fire plan, they do not die from lethal {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}. Instead, they heal <u>(5 × sure-fire plan stacks)</u>% of {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximum wounds{/g}, lose all stacks, and can no longer gain sure-fire plan stacks.

dea7c0de-0110-4000-8000-000000000110.Text:
The Space Marine gains +15 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} and +15 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}.
This effect lasts until the Space Marine moves. Does not stack.

dea7c0de-0111-4000-8000-000000000111.Text:
When used, for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g} the Space Marine and their allies do not suffer damage from allied attacks and deal +{uip|DamageBonus|6383ebaf92e443eaaeb3fe937032f33f}% more damage to enemies that were attacked by them since ability activation. If multiple Space Marines are in combat, the effect does not stack.
! Can only be used once per combat.

70e848f1-8049-4474-8245-033f8d11cace.Text: An Imperial world is one of a million planets united by the belief in the immortal God-Emperor. Hailing from hyper-technological societies to grimy feudal populations, the inhabitants of countless worlds offer fealty and devotion to the Master of Humanity and the Imperial Creed espoused by His servants. The designation "Imperial world" encompasses a vast array of wholly dissimilar worlds that are, nevertheless, part of the Imperium.

9616cc5a-9d48-4a5f-ba90-d9363eebc791.Text: Better to Die for the Emperor
